items.name_en: Size 16 x 10 x 7.5CM Fully original channels inside and out! items.name_cn:
Size 21*16*7cm
Monogram! LV has released a new camera bag, better than the Nano Speedy! This unassuming little bag will captivate you the moment you pick it up. It's not just the cute look, but also the large capacity for its size! It's a new fall/winter runway piece, so it's rare, but I can tell you this bag is love at first sight. Its authenticity and quality are well-known!

Size 21*16*7cm

I guarantee this is genuine merchandise sold at this price, and we are sourcing directly from the counter!

items.name_en: Size 23 x 13 x 6 CM Pure overseas channel goods! L&V 2022 new Denim Moon Bag, a limited counter item! The latest LOOP also continues the classic Moon Bag silhouette, replacing the monogram with denim jacquard, full of summer vibes! The key is it really looks good! Everyone knows how popular L&V's classic Moon Bag is, not to mention this limited Denim Moon Bag! It is out of stock on the official website worldwide and basically unavailable at the counter! So buying it is a bonus!

items.name_cn:
Size 24-14-5cm
A favorite small LV white checkered crossbody bag perfect for shopping. Very practical with two straps, can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody. Many people visit the counter but can't find it, and the small size is the hardest to get. Prices in China have risen again. This bag holds a lot: card holder, compact powder, lipstick, tissues, keys, and even a small power bank with ease. Features a magnetic snap and a small flat inner pocket.

items.name_cn:
Size: 16-19-6 cm
The hot-selling Utility Phone Pocket clutch has arrived. No need to doubt, we only make the best quality items! Details to follow. This bag is cut from Monogram canvas into a flexible shape, providing a place for your smartphone. A zippered pocket securely stores cards, cash, or keys. The adjustable canvas strap and metal chain are detachable, offering multiple carrying ways.
